auth.name: Name

auth.enterResetCode: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email and create a new password.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now login with your new password.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

values.title: Community Values
values.mustAccept: You must read and accept the community values to continue
values.value1: 1. Respect and Honor: We treat all members with dignity and respect
values.value2: 2. Biblical Truth: We uphold Seventh-day Adventist beliefs and teachings
values.value3: 3. Grace and Compassion: We support one another with love and understanding
values.value4: 4. Authenticity: We share honestly while maintaining appropriate boundaries
values.value5: 5. Sabbath Keeping: We honor the Sabbath and encourage rest and worship
values.value6: 6. Community Care: We look out for each other's spiritual wellbeing

legal.disclaimer: This platform offers spiritual support and community encouragement. It does not replace pastoral care, professional counseling, medical treatment, or emergency services.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: These Terms and Conditions apply to the acrosodos.com mobile application.
termsAndConditions.section1Content: acrosodos.com is a faith-based app for the Adventist community.
termsAndConditions.section2Content: Content does not replace medical, psychological, or legal advice.
termsAndConditions.section3Content: Users agree to act respectfully and in harmony with Christian values.
termsAndConditions.section4Content: All original content belongs to acrosodos.com unless stated otherwise.
termsAndConditions.section5Content: acrosodos.com is not responsible for decisions based on app content.
termsAndConditions.section6Content: These Terms may be updated at any time.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy applies to the acrosodos.com mobile app.
privacyPolicy.section1Content: We may collect basic profile information, email address, and non-sensitive usage data.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: Information is used to operate the app, improve services, and maintain a safe community.
privacyPolicy.section3Content: Reasonable measures are taken to protect user data, though no system is fully secure.
privacyPolicy.section4Content: We do not sell or rent personal information. Data is shared only when legally required.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: This app is not intended for children under 13 years of age.
privacyPolicy.section6Content: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. Changes will be posted within the app.

communityGuidelines.title: Community Guidelines
communityGuidelines.intro: These guidelines apply to all users of the acrosodos.com mobile app.
communityGuidelines.section1Content: All users must treat others with respect, kindness, and dignity.
communityGuidelines.section2Content: Conversations should support spiritual growth and constructive dialogue.
communityGuidelines.section3Content: Harassment, hate speech, misinformation, or explicit content is not allowed.
communityGuidelines.section4Content: Administrators may remove content or suspend accounts that violate these guidelines.
communityGuidelines.section5Content: Users can report content that violates these guidelines.
communityGuidelines.section6Content: These guidelines may be updated to protect the community.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
